title: Human Approval Request
description: Schema for requests that require human approval before the orchestrator can proceed. Used by the decision inbox and approval workflow.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this approval request.

reason.description: Why this operation requires human approval.

context.description: Additional context for the approver (run_id, affected paths, risk assessment, etc.).

requested_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when approval was requested.

requested_by.description: Agent or system that requested approval.

status.description: Current status of the approval request.

decided_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the decision was made.

ttl_seconds.description: Time-to-live in seconds; request expires if not decided within TTL.
